positive: A minimalist, retro-futuristic depiction of a solitary stylized mountain range under a vibrant, geometric sunset. The mountains should have clean, sharp silhouettes with alternating tones of burnt orange, teal, and indigo. The foreground features abstract, stylized desert flora (cacti, succulents) rendered in solid black shapes. The overall composition must be highly symmetrical and centrally focused, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, high contrast, flat vector art aesthetic, inspired by mid-century modern graphic design, negative space emphasis, perfect print-ready resolution.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, noisy, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, smudged, jpeg artifacts, grainy
